title: GregTech Experimental
description: A fully-featured port of GregTech 3 for modern minecraft versions
body: ### About **GregTech Experimental** is a fully-featured port/rewrite of GregTech 3 for modern minecraft versions, and an addon for IC2 Experimental. It offers all features of GT3, in their original form, unchanged. Machines, covers, upgrades, tools, as you know them. #### What is GregTech? **GregTech**, originally created by Gregorious Technecities, is a mod that overhauls [IndustrialCraft2](https://modrinth.com/mod/industrial-craft), adding several new machines, fluids, tools, and adjusting recipes to make them fit with its system, and to make everything work well together. ### Features - 🧹 The clean codebase rewrite based on GregTech 3 brings machine performance improvements and bugfixes - 📦 QOL improvements - ⚖️ Adjusted balance to accomodate IC2 experimental changes - 🔗 IC2 Experimental - Classic profile compatibility - 🔧 Highly configurable recipe system - 🇯 JEI compatibility - 🧩 Easier addon creating using our broad API ### Join our community Any feedback is appreciated! ![Github badge](https://img.shields.io/github/v/tag/Su5eD/GregTech-Experimental?color=light&label=GitHub&logo=github&sort=semver&style=flat) ### Disclaimer GregTech Experimental is not created or maintained by GregoriousT. A 1.19.2 port is [in progress](https://github.com/Su5eD/GregTech-Experimental/tree/forge-1.19.2).
